name: Calcolatore WACC
description: Calcola il costo medio ponderato del capitale di un'azienda.
seo_description: Calcola il costo medio ponderato del capitale di un'azienda. Calcolatore gratuito, preciso e istantaneo. Inserisci i tuoi valori e ottieni risultati.
example_label: Calculating WACC for company with 65% equity (11% cost), 35% debt (6% cost), and 25% tax rate.
result_context: The wacc of {wacc}% is the company's weighted average cost of capital, used as discount rate for investments.
mistakes: Using book values instead of market values for capital weights
Not adjusting debt cost for tax shield benefit
Using historical costs instead of current market costs
